resources.string: Text in a photo, document meaning, or a visual scene — without the cloud.
The catalog is connected; text and semantic search arrive after indexing.
Connect your library on the Readiness tab first.
Your library is not connected yet
Nayti will request access to photos only and show what is already searchable.
What you will be able to find
See how many photos are ready in each search channel.
Android opens the system picker first. You can share the full library or selected photos only.
Nayti sees only the current system selection. Other records stay hidden and are not treated as deleted.
The catalog is reconciled with MediaStore. Android remains in control of the originals.
Reconciliation stopped safely: %1$s. You can retry.
Only photos that can be opened safely with the current permission.
Selection limits, offline media, or changes that are not confirmed yet.
The first verified catalog records appear here after access is granted.
This diagnostic view verifies reading through the current ContentResolver grant.
The stale card was hidden immediately. Return to the library after reconciliation finishes.
The probe is size-bounded, never stored in the catalog, and released immediately after verification.
Manage the local index, model pack, and diagnostics without hidden sync.
The app has no INTERNET permission. Photos, OCR text, and queries stay on the device.
Observed records: %1$d. Quarantined by current access: %2$d.
Not installed. A signed offline pack will be imported separately from the APK.
